skill.name: culture-index
skill.summary: Organize and retrieve organizational culture documentation for teams
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All static analysis findings are false positives. The skill is a markdown documentation file with no executable code. URLs at lines 4 and 43 are reference links to GitHub repositories, not network calls. No cryptographic algorithms exist in the file - the scanner incorrectly flagged plain text descriptions. The skill poses no security risk.

content.value_statement: Teams struggle to access organizational culture information efficiently. This skill indexes culture documentation and enables fast retrieval of values, practices, and guidelines.
actual_capabilities: Index culture-related documents for organized storage
Retrieve specific organizational values and practices
Organize culture guidelines for easy access
Support knowledge base creation for team culture
limitations: Requires pre-existing culture documentation to index
Does not support real-time document synchronization

use_cases.title: HR Culture Management
use_cases.description: Human Resources teams organize and maintain company culture materials for employee access and onboarding programs.

use_cases.title: Team Alignment
use_cases.description: Team leaders establish and communicate cultural alignment by indexing and retrieving relevant team values and practices.

use_cases.title: Employee Onboarding
use_cases.description: New employees learn organizational values and practices by searching indexed culture documentation during onboarding.

prompt_templates.title: Index a Culture Document
prompt_templates.prompt: Index this culture document: [paste document content]. Organize it by topic and key values mentioned.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner - Quick indexing of a single document

prompt_templates.title: Search Culture Topics
prompt_templates.prompt: Search the indexed culture documentation for information about [specific topic]. Summarize the key points.

prompt_templates.title: Compare Department Cultures
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare the culture documentation between [Department A] and [Department B]. Identify shared values and differences.

prompt_templates.title: Generate Culture Report
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a comprehensive culture report from all indexed documents. Include core values, practices, and recommended improvements.

output_examples.input: Search for information about team values in the culture index
output_examples.output: Found 3 relevant sections: 1) Core Values - Collaboration, transparency, and continuous learning. 2) Team Practices - Weekly retrospectives and peer feedback sessions. 3) Communication Guidelines - Open door policy and async-first documentation.

output_examples.input: Index the Q4 culture survey results document
output_examples.output: Document indexed successfully. Extracted topics: Employee Satisfaction (85%), Work-Life Balance initiatives, Remote Work Policies, Professional Development opportunities. Added 12 searchable entries to the culture index.

best_practices: Keep culture documentation updated to reflect current organizational values
Use consistent terminology across all culture documents for better searchability
Schedule regular indexing sessions to maintain an accurate culture knowledge base
anti_patterns: Indexing outdated or deprecated culture documents that no longer reflect organizational values
Mixing unrelated content types in culture documentation, reducing search relevance
Creating overly complex search queries that return too many irrelevant results

faq.question: What types of documents can this skill index?
faq.answer: This skill can index any text-based culture documentation including team values, organizational guidelines, communication policies, and best practices documents.

faq.question: How do I search for specific culture information?
faq.answer: Provide a search query describing the topic you need. The skill will search indexed documents and return relevant sections with key points summarized.

faq.question: Can this skill work with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill is compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. All three AI assistants can use the indexing and search capabilities.

faq.question: How often should I update the culture index?
faq.answer: Update the index whenever new culture documents are created or existing documents are revised. A quarterly review is recommended to ensure accuracy.

faq.question: Can this skill compare culture across different teams?
faq.answer: Yes, you can request comparisons between team or department culture documentation to identify shared values and differences in practices.

faq.question: What happens if my culture documentation changes?
faq.answer: Re-index the updated documents to keep the culture index current. The skill does not automatically sync changes, so manual re-indexing is required.
